hero.title: Shape Your Future at
hero.subtitle: Empowering the next generation of innovators, engineers, and leaders. Experience world-class education with cutting-edge facilities and industry-aligned programs.

programs.title: Featured Programs
programs.subtitle: Discover majors designed for the future. Our curriculum is constantly updated to meet the demands of the modern workforce.

software.title: Software Engineering
software.desc: Master full-stack development, cloud architecture, and modern software design principles.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.desc: Dive deep into machine learning, neural networks, and natural language processing.

cyber.title: Cybersecurity
cyber.desc: Learn to defend networks, secure applications, and understand ethical hacking.

scholarships.title: Invest in Your Future
scholarships.subtitle: We believe that world-class education should be accessible. Asian Institute of Cambodia offers over $5M in scholarships annually to outstanding and deserving students worldwide.
scholarships.author: Sarah J., Class of 2025

about.headerSubtitle: Founded with a vision to lead the future of education, Asian Institute of Cambodia is dedicated to academic excellence, innovation, and global impact.
about.historyP1: Established in 1995, Asian Institute of Cambodia University began as a small institute for computer sciences. Today, we are a multidisciplinary powerhouse recognized globally for our rigorous curriculum and groundbreaking research.
about.historyP2: Our vision is to empower individuals to become creative problem solvers and leaders who can navigate and shape the complexities of the modern world.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Pushing the boundaries of knowledge through research.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: Upholding the highest ethical standards in academia.

inclusivity.title: Inclusivity
inclusivity.desc: Fostering a diverse and welcoming community.

footer.desc: Asian Institute of Cambodia. Empowering minds, shaping the future. A premier institute for technology, business, and innovation.
footer.rights: Asian Institute of Cambodia. All rights reserved.

programs.headerSubtitle: Explore our comprehensive range of undergraduate and graduate programs designed to prepare you for the future of work.

cs.title: Computer Science
cs.desc: A rigorous program covering algorithms, systems architecture, and artificial intelligence.

se.title: Software Engineering
se.desc: Focus on modern web and mobile application development, cloud computing, and DevOps.

cyber.title: Cybersecurity
cyber.desc: Learn network defense, ethical hacking, and secure application development.

ds.title: Data Science & AI
ds.desc: Master machine learning, big data analytics, and predictive modeling.

mba.title: MBA in Tech Management
mba.desc: Blend business leadership with technology strategy for modern enterprises.

mit.title: Master of Information Technology
mit.desc: Advanced study in enterprise systems, IT project management, and cybersecurity.

scholarships.headerSubtitle: We are committed to making world-class education accessible. Explore our range of merit and need-based scholarships.

merit.title: Presidential Merit Scholarship
merit.desc: Awarded to top-tier applicants with exceptional academic records and leadership potential.

women.title: Women in Technology Grant
women.desc: Designed to support and encourage outstanding female students pursuing STEM degrees.

innovator.title: Global Innovator Award
innovator.desc: For students who have demonstrated remarkable innovative thinking or created impactful projects.

need.title: Need-Based Opportunity Grant
need.desc: Financial assistance for brilliant students from disadvantaged backgrounds to ensure equal opportunity.

faculty.headerSubtitle: Learn from industry experts, leading researchers, and passionate educators dedicated to your success.

drChen.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
drChen.desc: Former Senior AI Researcher at Google. Specializes in Neural Networks and Ethics in AI.

profSok.name: Prof. Sok Visal
profSok.desc: 20+ years of enterprise software architecture experience. Passionate about DevOps and Scalable Systems.

drPatel.name: Dr. Rajesh Patel
drPatel.desc: Certified Ethical Hacker and former cybersecurity consultant for top-tier financial institutions.

alumni.headerSubtitle: Join a global network of over 10,000 successful graduates shaping the future of technology and business worldwide.

chheng.name: Chheng Rattana
chheng.desc: Graduated in 2018. Led the development of the nation's largest e-commerce platform.

sophea.name: Sophea Lin
sophea.desc: Graduated in 2020. Currently working on global supply chain optimization algorithms in Seattle.

virak.name: Virak Seng
virak.desc: Graduated in 2015. Founded the top cybersecurity firm in the region, protecting leading financial institutions.
